name: Reinforced Plating
description: Bolts on extra armor plates, increasing hull integrity by +20.

name: Shield Booster Array
description: Augments shield emitters, increasing shield capacity by +15.

name: Cargo Expansion Frame
description: External cargo frames increase capacity by +20.

name: Auxiliary Fuel Tanks
description: Additional fuel tanks increase max fuel by +10.

name: Inertial Dampers
description: Stability systems that reduce hull strain in risky maneuvers; increases hull by +12.

name: Mining Relay
description: Optimized drill servos and scanners improve yield consistency; boosts cargo by +15 for ore runs.

name: Pirate Decoy Buoys
description: Spoof beacons draw hostile scans away; reinforces shields by +10 to shrug off potshots.

name: Ore Compression Bay
description: Micro-presses shrink bulk ore, effectively adding +25 cargo capacity for minerals.

name: Mining LiDAR Suite
description: Precision scanners map veins faster, boosting mining yield and speed.

name: Geological Sampling Lab
description: Onboard lab improves assay quality, raising rare find odds and smoothing payouts.

name: Trade Forecaster Core
description: Predictive market suite that marginally boosts sale prices sector-wide.

name: Customs Liaison
description: Embedded liaison smooths paperwork and lowers local tariffs on your trades.
